reason: Defines desktop external API mode, Tauri command boundaries, DashboardHost behavior, and local runtime bridge ownership for device-local capabilities.
Defines generated DTO ownership for LLM Provider and frontend/backend contract drift requirements.
Defines cloud vs local backend authority and API/application/domain responsibility boundaries.
Defines stable API error mapping required for prepare/complete/cancel/fail endpoints.
Defines diagnostics and secret redaction expectations for OAuth code/token handling.
Defines generated wire type consumption and forbids parallel frontend DTO declarations.
Defines UI/model separation expectations for settings OAuth wizard changes.
